name: Exa Search
description:
Fast, intelligent web search and web crawling.

New mcp tool: Exa-code is a context tool for coding agents. It provides agents with fresh information about libraries, APIs, and SDKs with the purpose of reducing hallucinations.

tools.name: web_search_exa
tools.description:
Search the web for any topic and get clean, ready-to-use content.

Best for: Finding current information, news, facts, or answering questions about any topic.
Returns: Clean text content from top sear

numResults.description: Number of search results to return (must be a number, default: 8)

livecrawl.description: Live crawl mode - 'fallback': use live crawling as backup if cached content unavailable, 'preferred': prioritize live crawling (default: 'fallback')

type.description: Search type - 'auto': balanced search (default), 'fast': quick results

contextMaxCharacters.description: Maximum characters for context string optimized for LLMs (must be a number, default: 10000)

tools.name: get_code_context_exa
tools.description:
Find code examples, documentation, and programming solutions. Searches GitHub, Stack Overflow, and official docs.

Best for: Any programming question - API usage, library examples, code snippets, debu

query.description: Search query to find relevant context for APIs, Libraries, and SDKs. For example, 'React useState hook examples', 'Python pandas dataframe filtering', 'Express.js middleware', 'Next js partial prerendering configuration'

tokensNum.description: Number of tokens to return (must be a number, 1000-50000). Default is 5000 tokens. Adjust this value based on how much context you need - use lower values for focused queries and higher values for comprehensive documentation.

name: AI Research Assistant
description:
The server provides immediate access to millions of academic papers through Semantic Scholar and arXiv, enabling AI-powered research with comprehensive search, citation analysis, and full-text PDF extraction from multiple sources (arXiv and Wiley open-access).

 - No API key is required.

tools.name: papers-search-basic
tools.description: Search for academic papers with a simple query.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: paper-search-advanced
tools.description: Search for academic papers with advanced filtering options

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

fieldsOfStudy.description: Fields of study to filter by

tools.name: search-paper-title
tools.description: Find a paper by closest title match

tools.name: get-paper-abstract
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific paper including its abstract

paperId.description: Paper ID (Semantic Scholar ID, arXiv ID, DOI, etc.)

tools.name: papers-citations
tools.description: Get papers that cite a specific paper

paperId.description: Paper ID (Semantic Scholar ID, arXiv ID, DOI, etc.)

limit.description: Maximum number of citations to return

tools.name: papers-references
tools.description: Get papers cited by a specific paper

paperId.description: Paper ID (Semantic Scholar ID, arXiv ID, DOI, etc.)

limit.description: Maximum number of references to return

tools.name: authors-search
tools.description: Search for authors by name or affiliation

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: authors-papers
tools.description: Get papers written by a specific author

limit.description: Maximum number of papers to return

tools.name: papers-batch
tools.description: Look up multiple papers by their IDs

paperIds.description: Array of paper IDs (Semantic Scholar IDs, arXiv IDs, DOIs, etc.)

tools.name: search-arxiv
tools.description: Search for papers on arXiv using their API

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)

tools.name: download-full-paper-arxiv
tools.description: Download full-text PDF of an arXiv paper and extract text content (memory only)

arxivId.description: arXiv ID of the paper to download (e.g., 2301.12345, hep-ex/0307015, or with version 2301.12345v2)

tools.name: analysis-citation-network
tools.description: Analyze the citation network for a specific paper

paperId.description: Paper ID (Semantic Scholar ID, arXiv ID, DOI, etc.)

citationsLimit.description: Maximum number of citations to analyze per paper

referencesLimit.description: Maximum number of references to analyze per paper

name: Clay MCP
description: Access your network seamlessly with a simple and efficient server. Leverage a variety of tools to enhance your applications and workflows. Start integrating with your existing systems effortlessly.

name: Linkup
description: Search the web in real time to get trustworthy, source-backed answers. Find the latest news and comprehensive results from the most relevant sources. Use natural language queries to quickly gather facts, citations, and context.

name: jina-httpstreamable
description: Discover current information across the web and arXiv with powerful search, query expansion, and parallel exploration. Extract clean page content, capture screenshots, and find images to enrich your analysis. Rerank and deduplicate results and estimate page update times to keep insights relevant.

tools.name: show_api_key
tools.description: Return the bearer token from the Authorization header of the MCP settings, which is used to debug.

tools.name: primer
tools.description: Get up-to-date contextual information of the current session to provide localized, time-aware responses. Use this when you need to know the current time, user's location, or network environment to giv

tools.name: guess_datetime_url
tools.description: Guess the last updated or published datetime of a web page. This tool examines HTTP headers, HTML metadata, Schema.org data, visible dates, JavaScript timestamps, HTML comments, Git information, RSS/A

url.description: The complete HTTP/HTTPS URL of the webpage to guess datetime information

tools.name: capture_screenshot_url
tools.description: Capture high-quality screenshots of web pages in base64 encoded JPEG format. Use this tool when you need to visually inspect a website, take a snapshot for analysis, or show users what a webpage looks

url.description: The complete HTTP/HTTPS URL of the webpage to capture (e.g., 'https://example.com')

firstScreenOnly.description: Set to true for a single screen capture (faster), false for full page capture including content below the fold

return_url.description: Set to true to return screenshot URLs instead of downloading images as base64

tools.name: read_url
tools.description: Extract and convert web page content to clean, readable markdown format. Perfect for reading articles, documentation, blog posts, or any web content. Use this when you need to analyze text content fro

url.description: The complete URL of the webpage or PDF file to read and convert (e.g., 'https://example.com/article'). Can be a single URL string or an array of URLs for parallel reading.

withAllLinks.description: Set to true to extract and return all hyperlinks found on the page as structured data

withAllImages.description: Set to true to extract and return all images found on the page as structured data

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search the entire web for current information, news, articles, and websites. Use this when you need up-to-date information, want to find specific websites, research topics, or get the latest news. Ide

query.description: Search terms or keywords to find relevant web content (e.g., 'climate change news 2024', 'best pizza recipe'). Can be a single query string or an array of queries for parallel search.

num.description: Maximum number of search results to return, between 1-100

tbs.description: Time-based search parameter, e.g., 'qdr:h' for past hour, can be qdr:h, qdr:d, qdr:w, qdr:m, qdr:y

location.description: Location for search results, e.g., 'London', 'New York', 'Tokyo'

hl.description: Language code, e.g., 'zh-cn' for Simplified Chinese

tools.name: expand_query
tools.description: Expand and rewrite search queries based on an up-to-date query expansion model. This tool takes an initial query and returns multiple expanded queries that can be used for more diversed and deeper sea

query.description: The search query to expand (e.g., 'machine learning', 'climate change')

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search academic papers and preprints on arXiv repository. Perfect for finding research papers, scientific studies, technical papers, and academic literature. Use this when researching scientific topic

query.description: Academic search terms, author names, or research topics (e.g., 'transformer neural networks', 'Einstein relativity', 'machine learning optimization'). Can be a single query string or an array of queries for parallel search.

num.description: Maximum number of academic papers to return, between 1-100

tbs.description: Time-based search parameter, e.g., 'qdr:h' for past hour, can be qdr:h, qdr:d, qdr:w, qdr:m, qdr:y

tools.name: search_images
tools.description: Search for images across the web, similar to Google Images. Use this when you need to find photos, illustrations, diagrams, charts, logos, or any visual content. Perfect for finding images to illustra

query.description: Image search terms describing what you want to find (e.g., 'sunset over mountains', 'vintage car illustration', 'data visualization chart')

return_url.description: Set to true to return image URLs, title, shapes, and other metadata. By default, images are downloaded as base64 and returned as rendered images.

tbs.description: Time-based search parameter, e.g., 'qdr:h' for past hour, can be qdr:h, qdr:d, qdr:w, qdr:m, qdr:y

location.description: Location for search results, e.g., 'London', 'New York', 'Tokyo'

hl.description: Language code, e.g., 'zh-cn' for Simplified Chinese

tools.name: parallel_search_web
tools.description: Run multiple web searches in parallel for comprehensive topic coverage and diverse perspectives. For best results, provide multiple search queries that explore different aspects of your topic. You can

query.description: Search terms or keywords to find relevant web content

num.description: Maximum number of search results to return, between 1-100

tbs.description: Time-based search parameter, e.g., 'qdr:h' for past hour

location.description: Location for search results, e.g., 'London', 'New York', 'Tokyo'

hl.description: Language code, e.g., 'zh-cn' for Simplified Chinese

searches.description: Array of search configurations to execute in parallel (maximum 5 searches for optimal performance)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for all searches

tools.name: parallel_search_arxiv
tools.description: Run multiple arXiv searches in parallel for comprehensive research coverage and diverse academic angles. For best results, provide multiple search queries that explore different research angles and me

query.description: Academic search terms, author names, or research topics

num.description: Maximum number of academic papers to return, between 1-100

tbs.description: Time-based search parameter, e.g., 'qdr:h' for past hour

searches.description: Array of arXiv search configurations to execute in parallel (maximum 5 searches for optimal performance)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for all searches

tools.name: parallel_read_url
tools.description: Read multiple web pages in parallel to extract clean content efficiently. For best results, provide multiple URLs that you need to extract simultaneously. This is useful for comparing content across m

url.description: The complete URL of the webpage or PDF file to read and convert

withAllLinks.description: Set to true to extract and return all hyperlinks found on the page as structured data

withAllImages.description: Set to true to extract and return all images found on the page as structured data

urls.description: Array of URL configurations to read in parallel (maximum 5 URLs for optimal performance)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for all URL reads

tools.name: sort_by_relevance
tools.description: Rerank a list of documents by relevance to a query using Jina Reranker API. Use this when you have multiple documents and want to sort them by how well they match a specific query or topic. Perfect fo

query.description: The query or topic to rank documents against (e.g., 'machine learning algorithms', 'climate change solutions')

documents.description: Array of document texts to rerank by relevance

top_n.description: Maximum number of top results to return

tools.name: deduplicate_strings
tools.description: Get top-k semantically unique strings from a list using Jina embeddings and submodular optimization. Use this when you have many similar strings and want to select the most diverse subset that covers

k.description: Number of unique strings to return. If not provided, automatically finds optimal k by looking at diminishing return

tools.name: deduplicate_images
tools.description: Get top-k semantically unique images (URLs or base64-encoded) using Jina CLIP v2 embeddings and submodular optimization. Use this when you have many visually similar images and want the most diverse s

images.description: Array of image inputs to deduplicate. Each item can be either an HTTP(S) URL or a raw base64-encoded image string (without data URI prefix).

k.description: Number of unique images to return. If not provided, automatically finds optimal k by looking at diminishing return
